books.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: A young boy discovers he is a wizard and begins his magical education at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: Harry's second year at Hogwarts is haunted by a mysterious voice, petrified students, and the legend of the Chamber of Secrets.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: Harry learns a convicted murderer has escaped from Azkaban and is said to be coming for him — but the truth is far more complex.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: Harry is mysteriously entered into the deadly Triwizard Tournament, where champions face terrifying magical challenges.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: As Voldemort's return is denied by the Ministry of Magic, Harry and his allies form a secret student defence group.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: Dumbledore guides Harry into Voldemort's darkest past as war spreads beyond Hogwarts and terrible sacrifices loom ahead.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: In the final showdown, Harry, Ron, and Hermione abandon Hogwarts to hunt and destroy Voldemort's Horcruxes once and for all.

books.title: Dragon Masters #1: Rise of the Earth Dragon

books.title: Dragon Masters #2: Saving the Sun Dragon

books.title: Dragon Masters #3: Secret of the Water Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: A new Dragon Master arrives at the castle with a Water Dragon, but something seems very wrong with the new boy.

books.title: Dragon Masters #4: Power of the Fire Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: Drake and Rori's Fire Dragon is acting strange — and a visit to an ancient wizard reveals a dangerous quest ahead.

books.title: Dragon Masters #5: Song of the Poison Dragon

books.title: Dragon Masters #6: Flight of the Moon Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: The Dragon Masters travel to China to meet Mei and her Moon Dragon, but an evil wizard is after the powerful creature.

books.title: Dragon Masters #7: Search for the Lightning Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: Drake's Lightning Dragon goes missing and the Dragon Masters must race to find him before the dark wizard does.

books.title: Dragon Masters #8: Roar of the Thunder Dragon
books.author: Tracey West
books.description: The Dragon Masters discover a Thunder Dragon and must stop a dark wizard from using its immense power for evil.

books.title: Dragon Masters #9: Chill of the Ice Dragon

books.title: Dragon Masters #10: Waking the Rainbow Dragon

books.description: It's summer vacation and Greg would love to spend it playing video games — but his family has other, far more embarrassing plans.

books.title: Kidnapped
books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.description: A classic adventure novel following young David Balfour as he is betrayed, kidnapped, and drawn into the political turmoil of 18th-century Scotland.

books.title: All Around the Town
books.author: Mary Higgins Clark
books.description: A psychological suspense novel involving murder, trauma, and hidden identities.

books.title: The Complete Works of Shakespeare
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.description: A comprehensive collection of Shakespeare's plays, sonnets, comedies, tragedies, and historical works.

books.title: The Best of The Week
books.author: Reader's Digest
books.description: A curated anthology of engaging stories, articles, and features selected from Reader's Digest publications.

books.title: A Time to Kill
books.author: John Grisham
books.description: In his first novel, John Grisham tells the story of a small-town lawyer defending a father who takes justice into his own hands after a brutal crime against his daughter.

books.title: Behave: The Biology of Humans at Our Best and Worst
books.author: Robert Sapolsky
books.description: A sweeping exploration of human behavior, examining the biological, psychological, and social factors that shape why we do what we do.

books.title: Jack Kerouac: On the Road
books.author: Jack Kerouac
books.description: The iconic Beat Generation novel chronicling a cross-country journey of friendship, freedom, and self-discovery.

books.title: The Zahir
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A novelist searches for his missing wife and embarks on a journey of obsession, love, and self-discovery.

books.title: First Among Equals
books.author: Jeffrey Archer
books.description: The intertwined careers of four ambitious politicians competing for the highest office in Britain.

books.title: Clear Present Danger
books.author: Tom Clancy
books.description: Jack Ryan becomes entangled in a covert war against drug cartels and a political scandal reaching the highest levels.

books.title: The Stars Shine Down
books.author: Sidney Sheldon
books.description: A determined woman rises from poverty to become a real-estate tycoon while facing betrayal and danger.

books.title: The Winner Stands Alone
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A psychological novel set during the Cannes Film Festival exploring fame, obsession, and ambition.

books.title: Lives Not Lived
books.author: Monika Bhatti
books.description: A reflective novel exploring choices, relationships, and the paths people leave unexplored.

books.title: A Game of Thrones
books.author: George R. R. Martin
books.description: Noble families vie for control of the Iron Throne while an ancient threat begins to stir beyond the Wall. The first book in the epic A Song of Ice and Fire series.

books.title: A Clash of Kings
books.author: George R. R. Martin
books.description: As multiple kings claim the Iron Throne, war spreads across Westeros while danger grows in the North and across the Narrow Sea.

books.title: The Last Lecture
books.author: Randy Pausch
books.description: A beloved professor shares lessons on achieving childhood dreams, overcoming obstacles, and living a meaningful life.

books.title: Great Stories by Nobel Prize Winners
books.author: Various Authors
books.description: A collection of memorable stories from Nobel Prize-winning authors showcasing diverse styles, cultures, and literary excellence.

books.title: The Oath of the Vayuputras
books.author: Amish Tripathi
books.description: The conclusion to the Shiva Trilogy as Shiva confronts the source of evil and prepares for a decisive battle that will shape the future.

books.title: Eleven Minutes
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A young Brazilian woman's journey of self-discovery explores love, intimacy, and the search for meaning.

books.title: Brida
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A young Irish woman embarks on a spiritual quest seeking wisdom, magic, and her true destiny.

books.title: Bag of Bones
books.author: Stephen King
books.description: A grieving novelist retreats to a lakeside cabin where he encounters supernatural mysteries and long-buried secrets.

books.title: Windmills of the Gods
books.author: Sidney Sheldon
books.description: A university professor unexpectedly becomes a U.S. ambassador and finds herself at the center of an international conspiracy.

books.title: The Namesake
books.author: Jhumpa Lahiri
books.description: A moving story about identity, family, immigration, and the experience of growing up between two cultures.

books.title: Half Girlfriend
books.author: Chetan Bhagat
books.description: A small-town boy falls for an affluent Delhi girl, leading to a complicated relationship that defies easy labels.

books.title: The Lottery Winner
books.author: Mary Higgins Clark
books.description: A suspenseful collection of stories featuring ordinary people caught in extraordinary circumstances and unexpected twists.

books.title: Bloodline
books.author: Sidney Sheldon
books.description: The head of a powerful pharmaceutical empire uncovers a deadly conspiracy within her own family business.

books.title: Morning, Noon and Night
books.author: Sidney Sheldon
books.description: Three estranged siblings gather after their father's death and become entangled in a web of secrets, greed, and murder.

books.title: Partners in Crime
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.description: Tommy and Tuppence Beresford take over a detective agency and find themselves solving a series of intriguing and often dangerous cases.

books.title: The 3 Mistakes of My Life
books.author: Chetan Bhagat
books.description: Three friends in Ahmedabad pursue their dreams through business, cricket, and love, only to find their lives altered by ambition, friendship, and tragedy.

books.title: The Catcher in the Rye
books.author: J. D. Salinger
books.description: Holden Caulfield recounts a few turbulent days in New York City after being expelled from school, capturing the confusion and alienation of adolescence.

books.title: Cavemice: The Stone of Fire
books.author: Geronimo Stilton
books.description: Geronimo Stiltonoot and his prehistoric friends embark on an exciting quest involving a mysterious stone and plenty of Stone Age adventures.

books.title: Grandpa's Stories
books.author: Ruskin Bond
books.description: A charming collection of heartwarming tales that celebrate family, childhood, nature, and the simple joys of life.

books.title: The Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe
books.author: Traditional
books.description: A classic nursery tale about a woman with many children and the humorous adventures that follow in her unusual home.

books.title: The Happy Prince and Other Stories / The Canterville Ghost
books.author: Oscar Wilde
books.description: A collection featuring Oscar Wilde's beloved fairy tales, including The Happy Prince, alongside the humorous supernatural tale The Canterville Ghost.

books.title: Indian Folktales
books.author: Various Authors
books.description: A collection of traditional Indian stories filled with wisdom, humor, clever characters, and cultural heritage.

books.title: Classic Adventure Stories
books.author: Various Authors
books.description: An anthology of timeless adventure tales featuring daring heroes, thrilling journeys, and unforgettable discoveries.

books.title: Like the Flowing River
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A collection of reflections, essays, and personal stories in which Paulo Coelho shares insights on life, spirituality, travel, and human nature.
